user.title: Connect to Roborock
user.description: Enter the email address associated with your Roborock account.

data_description.email: The email you use to log in to the Roborock app.

code.title: Enter Verification Code
code.description: A verification code has been sent to your email. Enter it below.

data_description.code: The 6-digit code sent to your email.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Click submit to receive a new verification code.

error.invalid_email: No Roborock account found for this email address.
error.invalid_code: The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.
error.too_frequent_requests: Too many code requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Roborock cloud.
